creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Anton,

On wed 12 jun 13 at10:16:40 +0200, Anton Shterenlikht <mexas@bris.ac.uk>
 wrote:

> Do you know what's going on?
> 
> Do I have to rebuild python with gcc-4.8 as well?

I don't think so, but I guess that this problem with asteru could be due
to metis.

Could you please apply the latest patch medis-patch-Lib_Makefile.txt
included in PR ports/177201?

<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=177201>
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=177201&getpatch=3>

And then rebuild metis and aster?

Best regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
